case_title: MILLER DALE VS DEWOLF REALTY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: INVALID SERVICE AS TO DEWOLF REALTY COMP, NO DESCRIPTION OF PARTY SERVED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY MILLER DALE AS TO DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
